committee.committee_narrative: In today's risk-off environment, the committee has decided to increase positions in NVDA (conviction 82/100), GOOGL (conviction 79/100), META (conviction 78/100), AMZN (conviction 76/100), and MSFT (conviction 78/100), driven by upcoming catalysts such as earnings reports and product launches that are expected to reinforce growth trajectories.
